reviews.comment:
Por suerte en estos momentos la están modernizando. Especialmente los sanitarios qué eran un desastre para la cantidad de movimiento que existe en la estación de servicio. Ya que es una parada obligada antes de llegar a la cordillera. No hay muchos puntos de carga, de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Luckily, they're currently modernizing it. Especially the restrooms, which were a disaster given the amount of traffic at the service station. It's a mandatory stop before reaching the mountains, and there aren't many fuel pumps around.

reviews.comment:
La atención del restaurante buena pero la comida demasiado cara a demas el mozo que nos cobró se llevo el la propina y no el que nos atendió, espero que se la haya dado.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the restaurant was good, but the food was too expensive. Also, the waiter who charged us took the tip instead of the person who served us; I hope he gave it to the waiter.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kxMWVXNVZkVmRLWkRGQ2NUQnJRbmh1TkU5WU4wRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en la parrilla fue buena la comida no tanto y el precio fue excesivo para dos platos del día que erán un filet de pollo y un pedazo más con fritas y una coca de medio y total de 63.000 pesos no valía la pena. Al ser el plato del día debería ser incluso más barato y el pollo ni siquiera estaba tan condimentado. No volvería.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the grill was good, the food wasn't so great, and the price was excessive for two daily specials: a chicken fillet and another piece with fries, plus a half-liter Coke. The total of 63,000 pesos wasn't worth it. Since it was the daily special, it should have been even cheaper, and the chicken wasn't even that seasoned. I wouldn't go back.
